commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: fix(gateway): surface cross-agent subagent sessions via allAgents flag (#95295)
target.body:
Fixes #95295.

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users viewing the Control UI Sessions page or Recent Sessions sidebar for one agent could not see child sessions that were spawned from that workflow but stored under another configured agent. In the reported `dev` -> `orchestrator` case, the cross-agent subagent sessions existed in the session stores and could be listed from the CLI, but the web UI hid them unless they belonged to the currently selected agent.

## Why This Change Was Made

This PR makes the UI use the existing `configuredAgentsOnly: true` plus omitted `agentId` request shape when the `All agents` toggle is enabled, instead of adding a new `sessions.list` protocol field. Explicit per-agent refreshes still pass `agentId`, so scoped loads stay narrow while the all-agents view can surface cross-agent child sessions in both the Sessions table and Recent Sessions sidebar.

## User Impact

With `All agents` off, behavior is unchanged: the selected agent shows only its own sessions. With `All agents` on, operators can now see cross-agent child sessions in the Sessions table and Recent Sessions sidebar, including subagent runs spawned from another configured agent that were previously invisible.

## Evidence

- Live behavior proof used a real `pnpm openclaw --dev gateway` setup with two configured agents (`dev`, `orchestrator`), not seeded store files.
- Three real `sessions_spawn` calls from `agent:dev:main` created `agent:orchestrator:subagent:*` session records in the orchestrator store. The child runs later failed at model step in this dev environment because the OpenAI key returned `401`, but the session records were already persisted; this PR changes whether those persisted rows are visible in the UI.
- Before fix, the Recent Sessions sidebar only showed the current agent row, even after the cross-agent child sessions existed:

  ![Recent Sessions before fix](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/NianJiuZst/1130b0d32e4bdbefb777b91e46e0f58c/raw/ed9a2bfaac30f59cbc39570ffc4f87eebb2a7a0e/sidebar-before-fix.png)

- After fix, enabling `All agents` surfaces the `agent:dev:main` row plus the cross-agent `agent:orchestrator:subagent:*` rows in Recent Sessions:

  ![Recent Sessions after fix](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/NianJiuZst/1130b0d32e4bdbefb777b91e46e0f58c/raw/4a40a6daf61c75588da1e5b924b20312cb6d800b/sidebar-after-fix.png)

- The Sessions page also shows mixed `dev` and `orchestrator` rows in the same `All agents` view, matching the local screenshot captured for this PR.

- Focused validation:
  - `pnpm test src/gateway/server.sessions.store-rpc.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/sessions.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.sidebar.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol src/tui/embedded-backend.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.subagent.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils`
  - `pnpm tsgo:core`
  - `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
  - `pnpm oxfmt --check` on touched files
  - `pnpm protocol:gen:swift`
  - `git diff --check`
target.author: nianjiuzst
